creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2008-06-18 23:30:48 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    games                Makefile 
  Added files:
    games/plee-the-bear  Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
  Log:
  Plee The Bear will be a 2D platform jump and run game, as fun as
  the best platform games of the 90's (the golden age of this kind
  of games). You're a bear, trying to catch his son, which ran away
  after he ate all your honey.
  
  WWW: http://plee-the-bear.sourceforge.net/
  
  PR:             ports/124624
  Submitted by:   Dmitry Marakasov <amdmi3 at amdmi3.ru>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.1216    +1 -0      ports/games/Makefile
  1.1       +37 -0     ports/games/plee-the-bear/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/games/plee-the-bear/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/games/plee-the-bear/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +163 -0    ports/games/plee-the-bear/pkg-plist (new)
